Message handling, app synchronization, Bluetooth management, font and graphics functions, UI components, Rocky API, voice management, accelerometer and compass services, app event handling, heap and resource management, battery and connection services, health metrics, internationalization, logging, persistent storage, plugin services, template strings, tick timer, unobstructed area management, worker loops, and build configuration for Pebble firmware.

## Folders
- **[app_message](app_message/README.md)**: Message handling and communication for Pebble firmware, including inbox, outbox, and receiver management.
- **[app_sync](app_sync/README.md)**: Synchronization of application data and UI using message passing, dictionary operations, and callbacks.
- **[bluetooth](bluetooth/README.md)**: Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) management, including advertisement parsing, application state, connections, characteristics, client operations, descriptors, devices, iBeacon, scanning, security, and services.
- **[fonts](fonts/README.md)**: Functions and definitions for Unicode codepoint classification and font management in Pebble firmware.
- **[graphics](graphics/README.md)**: Graphics functions and structures for bitmaps, framebuffers, draw commands, paths, transformations, text, and UTF-8.
- **[legacy2](legacy2/README.md)**: UI components and animation management for Pebble firmware, including legacy action bar, menu, and text layers.
- **[pbl_std](pbl_std/README.md)**: Locale and time management functions, C Standard Library functions, and license terms for Pebble firmware.
- **[rockyjs](rockyjs/README.md)**: Rocky API implementation, code space reservation, JerryScript management, and RockyJS resource validation.
- **[ui](ui/README.md)**: User interface components and utilities for Pebble firmware, including dialogs, animations, layers, and window management.
- **[vendor](vendor/README.md)**: Tiny inflate algorithm and PNG/APNG image decoding implementations with licenses and build scripts.
- **[voice](voice/README.md)**: Manages dictation sessions, loading layer animations, transcription dialogs, and voice windows for Pebble firmware.

## Files
- **[accel_service.c](accel_service.c.md)**: Implements accelerometer service functions for session management, data handling, and event subscriptions.
- **[accel_service.h](accel_service.h.md)**: Header file for managing Pebble accelerometer services, including event subscriptions and data handling.
- **[accel_service_private.h](accel_service_private.h.md)**: Defines the `AccelServiceState` structure and functions for managing accelerometer sessions and events.
- **[app.c](app.c.md)**: Manages the event loop and rendering for Pebble applications, including handling button events and window transitions.
- **[app.h](app.h.md)**: Functions for app rendering, event loops, and retrieving the AppInstallId in the Pebble firmware.
- **[app_comm.c](app_comm.c.md)**: Functions to set and get the sniff interval for app communication.
- **[app_comm.h](app_comm.h.md)**: API for managing Bluetooth sniff intervals to balance power consumption and communication latency.
- **[app_exit_reason.c](app_exit_reason.c.md)**: Functions to get and set the application exit reason using system calls.
- **[app_exit_reason.h](app_exit_reason.h.md)**: API for setting and getting the reason an application exits in the system.
- **[app_focus_service.c](app_focus_service.c.md)**: Manages app focus events by subscribing and unsubscribing handlers for focus changes.
- **[app_focus_service.h](app_focus_service.h.md)**: Handles app focus events, allowing apps to respond to visibility changes with focus handlers.
- **[app_glance.c](app_glance.c.md)**: Functions for managing app glance slices, including adding slices and reloading app glance data.
- **[app_glance.h](app_glance.h.md)**: API for managing app glance slices, including adding, reloading, and handling expiration and icons.
- **[app_heap_analytics.c](app_heap_analytics.c.md)**: Functions for logging and analyzing heap memory usage and out-of-memory events in Pebble firmware.
- **[app_heap_analytics.h](app_heap_analytics.h.md)**: Functions for logging heap out-of-memory faults and capturing heap statistics for analytics.
- **[app_heap_util.c](app_heap_util.c.md)**: Utility functions for managing heap memory usage in different task states.
- **[app_heap_util.h](app_heap_util.h.md)**: Utility functions for calculating used and free heap memory in an application.
- **[app_inbox.c](app_inbox.c.md)**: Functions for creating, registering, destroying, and consuming an application inbox in Pebble firmware.
- **[app_inbox.h](app_inbox.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for managing an app inbox, including message handling and consumption.
- **[app_launch_button.c](app_launch_button.c.md)**: Defines a function to get the launch button ID using a system call.
- **[app_launch_button.h](app_launch_button.h.md)**: Declares a function to get the button ID for app launch under specific conditions.
- **[app_launch_reason.c](app_launch_reason.c.md)**: Functions to get the launch reason and arguments for an app in the Pebble firmware.
- **[app_launch_reason.h](app_launch_reason.h.md)**: API for determining the reason an application was launched, with various launch scenarios defined.
- **[app_light.c](app_light.c.md)**: Functions to enable light interaction and control light state using system calls.
- **[app_light.h](app_light.h.md)**: Functions to control Pebble's backlight, including enabling interaction and automatic control.
- **[app_logging.c](app_logging.c.md)**: Functions for logging application messages with variable arguments and formatting in Pebble firmware.
- **[app_logging.h](app_logging.h.md)**: Interface for the SDK's App Logging API, including functions and macros for logging messages.

- **[app_recognizers.h](app_recognizers.h.md)**: Functions to attach and detach recognizers in the Pebble firmware application.
